chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. Criminal Revision Application No.S- 44 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 16.12.2025. Mr. Raza Ali, Advocate holds brief for Mr. Ayatullah Khwaja, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Irfan Ali Talpur, D.P.G for State. = It appears from the order sheet dated 17.10.2025 that this matter was partly heard by my learned brother on the said date. Subsequently it was listed before the same bench on 31.10.2025 and once again on 28.11.2025, when my brother ordered that the matter will be heard on 16.12.2025, but office has listed it today for hearing before another bench as my brother is in the division bench. Office is reminded of the office order dated 30.08.2025, passed by the Honourable Chief Justice at the Principal Seat on the Assist. Reg. Roster-I ‘Note dated 29.08.2025 wherein the Honourable Chief Justice observed that: “[the term] ‘According to roster’ order by a Judge does not mean “Not before me” and therefore if the learned Judge is on roster, then such matters shall be fixed before the same learned Judge.” Given the above, office may discharge such lis and/or relist for hearing as per the Hon’ble Chief Justice’s office order dated 30.08.2025. Order accordingly. JUDGE Tufail
